---
title: "Pollinators in oil palm landscapes"
date: "2020"
description: "My dissertation work investigated the impacts oil palm has on mobile taxa providing ecosystem service in agricultural landscapes"
category: "research"
image: "../_images/oil-palm.jpg"
format:
  html:
    metadata:
      author: false
      date: false
      description: false
---

In my dissertation work in Indonesia, I found that oil palm pollinators may benefit from mesopredator-suppressing effects, e.g. insectivorous birds that spill over from the forest into the oil palm farm (Li et al. 2023, Agric Ecosyst Environ).
